svg.title: Multilingual RAG Enhancement Architecture
svg.desc: Six-phase plan showing the transformation from the current AI SQL Assistant to a multilingual RAG-powered system

g.text: Build indexing pipeline for schema docs
Test Hindi, French, Spanish, English parity
Replace full-schema injection with top-5 RAG
Show tables used, columns, context source
Auto chart suggestions via Plotly / Altair
Revenue trends, customer growth, top products
Every phase merges only if all 7 refactoring checks pass (connection → schema → agent → SQL gen → exec → display → prompts)
